message:
fix(atuin): pass --non-interactive to prevent install halting for input (#182)

The atuin installer prompts for shell history import and cloud login when
it detects a TTY (via /dev/tty). Since ACFS installs are non-interactive,
pass --non-interactive to skip these prompts. Fixed in all code paths:
the manifest verified_installer args, the generated installer, the
legacy cli_tools.sh fallback, the main install.sh, and acfs-update
reinstall path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -583,6 +583,7 @@ modules:
     verified_installer:
       tool: atuin
       runner: sh
+      args: ["--", "--non-interactive"]
     install: []
     verify:
       - ~/.atuin/bin/atuin --version

@@ -3862,7 +3862,7 @@ install_languages_legacy_tools() {
         log_detail "Atuin already installed"
     else
         log_detail "Installing Atuin for $TARGET_USER"
-        try_step "Installing Atuin" acfs_run_verified_upstream_script_as_target "atuin" "sh" || return 1
+        try_step "Installing Atuin" acfs_run_verified_upstream_script_as_target "atuin" "sh" "--non-interactive" || return 1
     fi
 
     # Zoxide - prefer apt to avoid GitHub API rate limits in CI

@@ -228,7 +228,7 @@ install_tools_atuin() {
                     fi
 
                     if [[ -n "$url" ]] && [[ -n "$expected_sha256" ]]; then
-                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'sh' '-s'; then
+                        if verify_checksum "$url" "$expected_sha256" "$tool" | run_as_target_runner 'sh' '-s' '--' '--non-interactive'; then
                             install_success=true
                         else
                             log_error "tools.atuin: verify_checksum or installer execution failed"

@@ -496,7 +496,7 @@ install_atuin() {
         return 1
     fi
 
-    if ! _cli_run_as_user "source '$CLI_TOOLS_SCRIPT_DIR/security.sh'; verify_checksum '$url' '$expected_sha256' 'atuin' | sh"; then
+    if ! _cli_run_as_user "source '$CLI_TOOLS_SCRIPT_DIR/security.sh'; verify_checksum '$url' '$expected_sha256' 'atuin' | sh -s -- --non-interactive"; then
         log_warn "Could not install atuin"
     fi

@@ -2138,7 +2138,7 @@ update_atuin() {
     else
         # Fallback to reinstall via official installer with checksum verification
         if update_require_security; then
-            run_cmd "Atuin (reinstall)" update_run_verified_installer atuin
+            run_cmd "Atuin (reinstall)" update_run_verified_installer atuin --non-interactive
         else
             # Last resort: no checksum verification available
             if [[ "$YES_MODE" == "true" ]]; then
